name: l7_hole_collapse_mode_gate_95
description: Switch to survival strategy when holes exceed 95 so collapse-prone wide-board states stop prioritizing greedy clears.
llm_notes: Failure episodes average 99.66 holes vs 75.22 in successes (delta 24.44) while height differs by only 0.41, so hole-triggered gating should separate terminal trajectories earlier.

name: l7_opening_hole_penalty_0_20_v2
description: Apply stronger hole suppression through the first 20 pieces to prevent early-board damage before midgame stabilization.
llm_notes: Failures end after only 23.23 pieces on average with 99.66 holes, and outlier episodes show lower early holes (78.8) than baseline early holes (85.7), supporting a longer opening discipline window.

name: l7_surface_volatility_brake_critical_height
description: Increase bumpiness penalty only once the stack is in the critical height band, focusing anti-volatility control near terminal risk.
llm_notes: Bumpiness is a strong separator (7.92 failure vs 1.44 success, delta 6.48), and level-7 avg height is already 19.63, so a critical-height gate should concentrate the penalty where deaths cluster.
